title: paspalum notatum
intro: Paspalum notatum, also known as Bahiagrass, is a tropical grass species native to South America and the southern United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can be attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Paspalum notatum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the immune system, making it a valuable herb in the treatment of various ailments. Herbal preparations of Paspalum notatum can be made by infusing its leaves in hot water, creating a tea that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
